ModMetaData.name: Better Mod Sort(And Error Inspector)
ModMetaData.author: Yan
ModMetaData.description:
[EN] Installed a bunch of mods but don't know how to order them? This mod can connect to Large Language Models (LLMs) and let AI suggest a more reasonable load order based on your mod list and actual error reports.
To let the AI know which mods might have conflicts, this mod will automatically intercept runtime errors in the background, analyze which mod caused them, and record this information as reference data for the AI sorting.
Usage: Play a game normally first (or load a game once) to let the mod collect error info for the AI, and then use the AI sorting for better results.
Error Source Analysis: Even without AI sorting, this feature helps you find the culprit of red errors. It accurately traces DLLs, XML parsing nodes, Def configs and Inheritance chains, Cross-References, CE compatibility contexts, and file paths. Results are saved to BetterModSort.Error.txt and printed to the console.
Supports English, Simplified Chinese, and Russian.
Compatibility: - Fully compatible with ModManager. When AI sorting is enabled in the settings, clicking ModManager's native auto-sort button will trigger the AI sorting process instead.
